title: Isolation and characterization of hydroxoaqua and µ-dihydroxobisethylene-diaminecobalt(III) analogue with biguanide (BigH/C2H7N5)
author: R. K. Prasad
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Department of Chemistry, Patna Science College, Patna University, Patna-800 005, Bihar, India 
 E-mail:  rkpd6@yahoo.com 
Department of Chemistry, Magadh Mahila College (Patna University), Patna-800 001, Bihar, India 
 Manuscript received 22 October 2009, revised 5 May 2010, accepted 6 May 2010  

 Mono and dinuclear complexes of biguanide (BigH) with cobalt(lll) or compositions [Co(BigH) 2 (OH) 
(H 2 O)]X.nH 2 O, where X = 2CI - , SO 4  2-  and n = 1 or 2, [Co(BigH) 2 (NH 3 ) 2 ] 2 (SO 4 ) 3 .12H 2 O and µ·dihydroxotetrakis· 
blguanldlnedlcobalt(lll) [(Big) 2 Co(OH) 2 Co(Big) 2 ], where Big = C 2 H 6 O 5  have been prepared from bisbiguanidiniumcobalt(ll) 
base, [Co(BigH) 2 ](OH} 2  and characterised from the studies of magnetic susceptibility, IR and electronic absorption spectra. 
Physical characteristics of complexes resemble with  cis  configuration.
